handle 24O0 tons. 1t doesn't take any
more men to handle the 2400 tons
than it did the 600-in fact. less.


There are a few more figures
would like to give you. A year or
so ago the railroad commission had
an expert ascertain the cost or one
of the leading northwestern trunk
lines from st. Paul to the coast. He
reported that the entire road cost
about $4,000 per mile. The same
year that railroad declared IL per
cent dividend on 100000 per mile or
s24, 900 net profits per mile-120 per
cent on actual money invested. You
can also note that based on those
figures the rates all over the coun-
try could be reduced 80 per cent and
they would still be making 80 per
cent on the actual investment.


(The writer OF this letter requests
that his nama not be made public a.
